title: Gio Scotti Fat Discourse
about: The Gio Scotti Fat Discourse refers to online discourse and debates about Italian model Gio Scotti, claiming that she "got fat" in 2025. Posts about Scotti's perceived weight gain began going viral as early as July 2025, increasing in prominence on sites like X / Twitter over the following months. Despite the claims, many have argued that Scotti does not appear overweight or to have significantly gained weight, leading some to suggest that the claims about her weight gain are from incels and trolls trying to bait people. One common joke relating to Scotti and her supposed weight gain claims that she got fat from eating too much pasta.
origin:
On July 18th, 2025, X[1] user @Anarseldain posted, "GIO SCOTTI IS FAT NOW. AHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA. AHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA," garnering over 1,800 likes in three months. In a comment, the user wrote, "You all deserve it for putting this tattooed e-prostitute on my timeline for all these years. You were a mark. You fell for it. HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA." This is the earliest known post to claim that Scotti has gotten fat.

At the time of the post, Scotti had recently posted photos to Instagram,[2] although it does not appear as if she had put on a significant amount of weight as opposed to her previous posts.
